text.title: Adobe Firefly Creative Cloud Integration Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying adobe-firefly-integration. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Prompts vary wildly; output drifts off-brand within a quarter.
Off-brand asset lands in shared library; takedown cycle.
Failed audits never reviewed; systematic prompt error invisible.
antipattern.fix: Route fails to designer review queue.

antipattern.symptom: Designer switches to fine-tune; loses IP indemnity.
